cause_analysis.narrative: i.am.jessicarose churned on 2026-02-13 after 188 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 23-day silence starting 2025-12-30. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 25 times, but the client only replied 6. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.

messages.body: Hi Jessica,   As per your request, your account has been cancelled. We are sorry to see you go, and if you ever need us in the future, we would be happy to have you back. Wishing you all the best with your business!
Request Closed
